mission.title: istio: Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths
mission.description: Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths. This issue affects 63+ users.

steps.title: Identify istio troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your istio deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=istio
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths

steps.title: Check current Service configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant istio resources:
```bash
kubectl get service -A
kubectl describe service <name> -n <namespace>
```
(This is used to request new product features, please visit <https://discuss.istio.io> for questions on using Istio)

**Describe the feature request**
Support regex paths for ServiceRole spec.rules.pa

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths
steps.description:
+1
Knative on Istio have to use `triggerRules.excludedPaths.{exact,prefix}` for authentication policy as knative service gets health checking and metrics collection from external(knative system pods). So this feature is really necessary.
Cloud Run's solution also suggested it [here](https://cloud.go
```yaml
apiVersion: rbac.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceRole
metadata:
  name: view-swagger
  namespace: dp
spec:
  rules:
  - services: ["*"]
    paths:
    - "*/swagger-ui.html"
    - "*/api-docs"
    - "*/swagger-resources"
    - "*/swagger-resources/configuration/ui"
    - "*/swagger-resources/configuration/security"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/open-sans-v15-latin-regular.woff2"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/open-sans-v15-latin-700.woff2"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/source-code-pro-v7-latin-300.woff2"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/titillium-web-v6-latin
```

steps.title: Confirm Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: +1
Knative on Istio have to use `triggerRules.excludedPaths.{exact,prefix}` for authentication policy as knative service gets health checking and metrics collection from external(knative system pods). So this feature is really necessary.
Cloud Run's solution also suggested it [here](https://cloud.google.com/solutions/authorizing-access-to-cloud-run-on-gke-services-using-istio#configuring_istio_aut. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: rbac.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceRole
metadata:
  name: view-swagger
  namespace: dp
spec:
  rules:
  - services: ["*"]
    paths:
    - "*/swagger-ui.html"
    - "*/api-docs"
    - "*/swagger-resources"
    - "*/swagger-resources/configuration/ui"
    - "*/swagger-resources/configuration/security"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/open-sans-v15-latin-regular.woff2"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/open-sans-v15-latin-700.woff2"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/source-code-pro-v7-latin-300.woff2"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/titillium-web-v6-latin-700.woff2"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/springfox.js?v=2.9.2"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/swagger-ui-bundle.js?v=2.9.2"
    - "*/springfox-swagger-ui/swagger-ui-standalone-preset.js?v=2.9.2"

apiVersion: rbac.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceRole
metadata:
  name: view-swagger
  namespace: dp
spec:
  rules:
  - services: ["*"]
    regex_paths:
    - \/.*swagger.*
    - \/.*api-docs

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with istio installed or the issue environment reproducible.
